title: move_dir_add Command
description: Move to specified direction ('up', 'down', 'left', 'right'). Supports adding moves to already existing.
markdownDescription: *Move* to specified direction ('up', 'down', 'left', 'right'). Supports adding moves to already existing.

prefixItems.title: move_dir_add command
prefixItems.description: Move to specified direction ('up', 'down', 'left', 'right'). Supports adding moves to already existing.
prefixItems.markdownDescription: *Move* to specified direction ('up', 'down', 'left', 'right'). Supports adding moves to already existing.

dt_comp.title: Delta-time Compensation
dt_comp.description: Specifies if the movement is compensated by current framerate. Default is True
dt_comp.markdownDescription: Specifies if the movement is compensated by current framerate. Default is `true`

absolute.title: Do not apply velocity on the movement
absolute.description: Specifies if the movement is adjusted using velocity. Default is True
absolute.markdownDescription: Specifies if the movement is adjusted using velocity. Default is `true`
